seoTitle: Ascot Park vs Ashford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ascot Park and Ashford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ascot Park vs Ashford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ascot Park and Ashford.
heading: Ascot Park vs Ashford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ascot Park, South Australia and Ashford, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ashford has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Ascot Park (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ascot Park or Ashford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ascot Park has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Ashford scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ascot Park scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Ashford scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ascot Park or Ashford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ashford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
